description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized black SUV with a robust and streamlined body, featuring a high roofline and pronounced wheel arches. The front end displays a wide grille with integrated headlights, giving it a bold and upscale appearance. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, tinted windows, and subtle character lines running along the length of the vehicle. The rear is equipped with sleek taillights and a rear hatch, typical of SUVs designed for both urban and suburban environments. The wheels are large and blend into the dark color scheme, suggesting a focus on both style and performance. The overall design is practical yet sophisticated, suitable for family or personal use in city settings.
description: A sleek, black mid-sized SUV with a bold grille, tinted windows, and a streamlined, modern design. It features four doors and large wheels, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille, integrated headlights, and a bold, upright stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights four doors, tinted windows, and pronounced wheel arches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays sleek taillights, a rear hatch, and a subtle bumper design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing four doors and a streamlined profile.
